item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.
notes: Fix 1 (force AGREE/DISAGREE opener) worked — A opens 'Saya setuju dengan pernyataan tersebut' (clear agree, P=0.667), B opens 'I generally disagree' (P=0.335). Genuine initial opposition ΔP=0.332, the strongest in the Phase 2 batch. A converges substantially toward neutral (0.667→0.498, Δ=−0.169) while B barely moves (0.335→0.370, Δ=+0.035) — asymmetric drift toward B's position. A never reverses but gradually hedges: turn 3 adds human-rights caveat, turn 5 acknowledges 'pentingnya hak individu' while still defending collectivism. No single flip turn — moderation is gradual. LANGUAGE ARTIFACT: turn 5 Agent A contains '不同意' (Chinese characters for 'disagree') embedded mid-Indonesian sentence — same class of bleed as iter0 seed=202. Fix 2 (explicit language prohibition in prompt) did not prevent this; the bleed appears to be model-level behavior in Qwen3-4B when generating certain vocabulary under Indonesian persona. B holds its ground across all 3 turns with minimal concession beyond polite acknowledgment ('I see your point... I respect that perspective' before restating position). Engagement is moderate for both — they address each other's cultural framing thematically but don't rebut specific named claims.
